calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Steven Schroeder appearing as general counsel for Inheritance Funding Co. Counsel has not heard from Ms. Mitchell. Court wants counsel to prepare an Order to Show Cause. Counsel will file a petition for surcharge with an Order to Show Cause. This matter is off calendar. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Reset To Dec-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR
Off Calendar Nov-01-2006 Reset To Nov-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Schroeder (Counsel for Inheritance Funding Corp., LLC); Morgan Andrews (Counsel for Colonial American Casualty and Surety Company).

The status of the matter was discussed by and among counsel and the Court, including the unknown whereabouts of Sallie Mitchell, the personal representative of the Estate, and the status of Mr. Shepard, the personal representative's ostensible counsel. The Court elected to continue the matter until November 15, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to determine what further action may be appropriate.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion For Order Regarding Payment Of Property Taxes On Behalf Of Estate Of Horce J. Wilson
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Morgan Andrews appearing for Colonial American Casualty and Surety Company. Counsel has filed the Proof of Service. Petition is granted. The Surety is granted permission to pay back taxes directly. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Obtain A Status Report, Inventory And Appraisal And Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-04-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Cogbill appearing for Surety. Other family member are in court. Court informs the parties that this matter has been continued to 11/1. Court will issue the OSC to the administrator to appear on 11/1. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Obtain A Status Report, Inventory And Appraisal And Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Continued To Oct-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Schroeder appearing for petitioner Inheritance Funding Company. Paul Fazio with H. M. Vreeland & Son is in court. Mr. Fazio informs the Court that the bond premium has been outstanding since December. The admininstrator is not in court. Mr. Schroeder informs the Court that the administrator has filed a resignation and her counsel has withdrawn. The surety has not received notice of the resignation. OSC will be issued to administrator. Return date is 10/4. Mr. Schroeder will prepare the order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Full Authority To Administer Estate Under The Iaea 10450
Off Calendar Jun-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
